text.tspan: OCC 2023-17: SDLC controls embedded in development pipeline. DORA: Resilience testing via
DevSecOps pipeline. SR 11-7: AI Model Validation conditional on AI initiative type.

text.tspan: SOX: Compliance validation gates mandatory for financial application changes. GDPR/CCPA:
Privacy controls validated at Post-Code Gate. EU AI Act: AI model validation at SP-6C testing phase.
